tldr: Max Kanter took the bunch sprint for XDS-Astana after a Teunissen lead-out, ahead of Laurence Pithie and Jasper Stuyven. Lamperti held the leader's jersey.

narrative.headline: Kanter takes the bunch
narrative.body: Standard bunch sprint stage; Mike Teunissen's lead-out delivered Kanter to the front for XDS-Astana's first WorldTour win of the year.

gcImpact.headline: Lamperti holds leader's jersey
gcImpact.body: Sprint stage, no GC change of note.
